title: Paul Anthony Pro Series T3 Beard and Neckline Lithium LCD Trimmer - 25mm Precision Detail Trimming - High Carbon Blades - 2-10mm Adjustable Comb Guide - Fixed Trimming Guides 3/5mm - H5123L
features: 25MM PRECISION TRIMMER FOR DETAILING AND MICRO-TOUCHING: Ultra-sharp high carbon stainless steel blades rapidly oscillate for a smooth finish, perfect for precision detailing and micro-touching facial hair. The trimmer has a stylish, ergonomic design which is comfortable in the hand, portable and easy to use.

FIXED AND ADJUSTABLE COMB GUIDES INCLUDED: Control the length of your eyebrows, moustache, beard and body hair with the adjustable comb attachment for 2, 4, 6, 8 and 10mm to personalise your look. There are also 2 fixed trimming guides to attach to the trimmer for precision 3mm and 5mm trimming or for an extremely close trim, remove the comb guide completely. Lubricating oil and cleaning brush are also included.
LITHIUM POWERED: The Lithium battery allows ultra fast charging time and longer life use. It is easly recharged using any USB charging source.

90MIN USAGE TIME: The trimmer has an approximate 90 minutes operating time, suitable for over 30 trims before re-charging using the included USB charging cable. The Lithium battery takes approximately 90 minutes for a full charge, but can be used within 5 mins of charging time. The LCD display will advise when charging is needed, when fully charged and shows full percentage of power.
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Your purchase is covered with a 2 year guarantee for added peace of mind. See details
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Pro Series T3 Beard and Neckline Trimmer offers precision trimming and detailing with 3mm and 5mm fixed trimming guides, an adjustable comb guide with 2, 4, 6, 8 and 10mm settings and ultra-sharp carbon stainless steel blades built to last which rapidly oscillate for an even finish. Control the length of your eyebrows, moustache, beard and body hair to personalise your look. The Lithium battery allows ultra fast charging time and longer life use. It is easly recharged using any USB charging source. The LCD Display instantly shows the battery status and advises when it needs to be recharged. The trimmer has approximately a 90 minute operating time and can be fully recharged using the USB charging cable included in approximately 2 hours. A 10 minute charging time would normally last 10 minutes of usage time. Your purchase is covered with a 2 year guarantee for added peace of mind. Make sure to complete and return the warranty card with proof of purchase Box Includes: 1 x Paul Anthony Pro Series T3 Beard and Neckline Trimmer 1 x 3mm fixed trimming guide 1 x 5mm fixed trimming guide 1 x adjustable comb guide 1 x lubricating oil 1 x cleaning brush 1 x USB charging cable Safety Warning Always keep the trimmer away from water while charging and using. Be cautious when handling the ultra-sharp blades to avoid cuts. Clean the trimmer regularly using the provided lubricating oil and cleaning brush to prevent bacterial growth. Always unplug the trimmer from the power source before cleaning or storing.
